scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:calc
scripts.test:api: docker run --rm --tmpfs /app/uploads:rw,uid=10001,gid=10001,mode=0770 ocidisblueprint-api:latest python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider app/tests -q
scripts.test:calc: docker run --rm -w /calc-engine ocidisblueprint-api:latest python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider src/tests -q
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec -T api alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:rollback: docker compose exec -T api alembic downgrade -1
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec -T api python -m app.migrations.seed
scripts.lint:api: docker run --rm ocidisblueprint-api:latest ruff check --no-cache app /calc-engine/src
